title: Creeper's Deco
description: A mod that add new decoration to Minecraft!
body:
Creeper's Deco adds a variety furniture and decor to Minecraft. From things like Lamps to Carpet and Chairs, there is a ton of ways to decorate your minecraft world with Creeper's Deco.
There will be a lot of updates in quick succesion, so always look for a new update. Sorry for any bugs, I unfortunately do not have a way for people to submit issues for now.
Want to see new updates? See my [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@TheRedCreeper29) for videos on the newest stuff!

_This was made using MCreator and Blockbench._
